h2: Stop Creating Random Content. Start Building A Revenue System.
h3: Most Brands Don't Have A Content Problem.
If users see the wrong message at the wrong time, performance drops.
How We Build Your Creative Funnel
We've partnered with brands across Egypt, MENA, and the US to build, scale, and thrive.
Choose The Funnel That Fits Your Growth Stage

h5: 28M EGP In Net Sales Through A Structured Funnel
p: We help brands build high-performing creative funnels through strategic content, UGC, and performance-driven ads designed to increase conversions across every stage of the customer journey.
We analyze your performance metrics, identify where the funnel is breaking, then create the right creatives for every stage of the customer journey.
Explore a mix of performance-driven videos, UGC, motion creatives, and static visuals designed for different stages of the funnel.
Content without strategy leads to inconsistent messaging and wasted effort.
Ads that look like everyone else's don't stop the scroll or drive action.
Following trends without alignment to your funnel strategy burns budget.
More ad spend without strategy results in diminishing returns.
Traffic without funnel optimization leaves revenue on the table.
Without a creative system, results are unpredictable and unstable.
Most brands focus on creating more content. The real problem is creating the right content for the right stage of the customer journey.
Wasted ad spend on untested concepts
Right message to right audience at right stage
Attract better traffic with targeted TOF content
Build trust through strategic MOF engagement
Convert more efficiently with optimized BOF
Stronger CTRs, Lower CPCs, Better conversion rates
We analyze your ad performance, identify funnel gaps, and understand what’s hurting your results across CTR, CPC, CVR, and CPP.
We map the customer journey and define the right creative approach for every funnel stage: TOF, MOF, and BOF.
We develop strategic concepts, hooks, scripts, UGC, and performance creatives designed around buyer behavior and platform psychology.
You receive a fully-structured creative funnel organized by stage, format, and objective — ready for launch, testing, and scaling.
The brand needed to scale seasonal sales while maintaining profitable acquisition costs.
Tested multiple audiences, hooks, and creative angles to identify winning combinations.
TOF: Tested multiple audiences, hooks, and creative angles to identify winning combinations.
MOF: Used UGC, reviews, bundles, and social proof to build trust and increase buying intent.
BOF: Launched retargeting creatives with FOMO messaging for ATC & IC audiences to drive conversions efficiently.
Perfect for brands starting to build a structured creative funnel system.
Built for brands ready to scale with more creative testing and stronger funnel coverage.
Designed for aggressive testing, scaling, and deeper funnel coverage.

h2: From Homepage to Checkout — Websites Built for Profitability.
h3: From high-converting eCommerce stores to sleek corporate sites
We've partnered with brands across Egypt, MENA, and the US to build, scale, and win.
From Brief to Live in 8 Proven Steps.
More Content. Less Spend. Faster Growth.
Ready for a Website That Works as Hard as You Do?
p: Every page, every button, every image is crafted to move your visitors toward action — whether that’s buying, booking, or getting in touch.
We design and develop on platforms like Shopify, WordPress, and Framer — always with performance in mind.
Too many websites just sit there. We make sure yours works around the clock to move your business forward.
Shopify and WordPress stores designed to convert, using CRO-tested flow.
Property listings, broker sites, and developer portfolios.
For professional services, manufacturing, and B2B companies.
For launches, summits, and seasonal campaigns.
Stelllar unlocked a level of scale we couldn’t crack for months. We saw real growth — not just traffic.
We finally feel like we have a performance partner, not just an agency. Everything is data-backed and results-driven.
Their creative process is fast, collaborative, and sharp. Our UGC and ads actually perform now.
The Stelllar team rebuilt our funnel from scratch — and revenue followed. No fluff, just action.
The Stelllar team is fast, responsive, and always on top of the numbers.
We don’t just make websites “pretty.” We make them  profitable.
Conversion-focused checklists on all key pages.
Apps that enhance UX and boost AOV.
Makes it easy for users to act.
Our process keeps projects moving fast — without cutting corners.
We start by understanding your brand, goals, audience, and the role your website plays in your growth.
We review your existing site (if you have one) against our CRO checklist to spot conversion blockers and UX gaps.
We match your needs with the right platform (Shopify, WordPress, Framer) and a theme we can enhance.
We tailor the design to your brand, applying CRO improvements and adding UX boosters.
From copy to images to product data — everything is optimized before it goes live.
We test on all devices and browsers, check page speed, and validate every conversion flow.
You get a walkthrough, admin access, and any training needed.
We monitor performance and suggest data-backed tweaks for even better results.
We have gained proficiency in a diverse array of tools, equipping me to craft robust and innovative solutions
Building high-performing Shopify stores with sleek design, seamless navigation, and conversion-focused experiences.
Crafting dynamic, user-friendly websites on WordPress with a perfect balance of creativity, flexibility, and performance.
Designing modern, interactive websites on Framer that merge aesthetics with fluid user experiences.
Choose the package that fits your speed and scale
Scope: Shopify Basic or Framer landing build
3-page Shopify setup (Home, Product, Checkout) or 1-page Framer site
Who it’s for: Early-stage founders, MVP launch
Full Shopify theme customization (Home, Collections, PDPs, Cart, Checkout)
Conversion-tracking setup (GA4, Meta/TikTok pixels, server-side optional)
Who it’s for: Scaling DTC brands (EGP 150K+ monthly revenue)
Monthly Maintenance: EGP 12K (tracking health, small CRO tweaks, app management)
Everything in Growth Store plus: CRO Audit & A/B testing
Who it’s for: Growth brands EGP 900K+ monthly revenue needing CRO & data
Monthly Maintenance: EGP 18K (testing, landing pages, analytics upkeep)
End-to-end Shopify Plus store migration or redesign
Build Fee: EGP 250K–300K depending on complexity
Monthly Maintenance: EGP 60K+ Monthly updates, CRO tests, tracking/ERP checks, SEO & speed audit, security, 4h SLA, 12–20 dev hrs, emergency fixes, report + call
Need more details? Share your question with us and we’ll be happy to help.
Can you work with clients remotely?

Absolutely! We have experience working with clients from all around the world. Through effective communication channels such as email, video calls, and project management tools, We ensure seamless collaboration regardless of geographical location.
How long does it typically take to complete a web design project?

The timeline for each project varies depending on its scope and complexity. Factors such as the number of pages, functionalities required, and client feedback process can impact the timeline. Upon discussing your project requirements, We will provide you with a realistic timeline and keep you updated throughout the process.
Do you offer website maintenance services?

Yes, We offer website maintenance services to ensure your website remains up to date, secure, and optimized. From content updates and bug fixes to performance optimization and security enhancements, We can provide ongoing support to keep your website running smoothly.
